metadata.description: Agent skills for NVIDIA cuOpt: routing (VRP, TSP, PDP), LP/MILP/QP, installation (Python/C/developer), and REST server.

plugins.name: cuopt-user-rules
plugins.description: Base behavior rules for using NVIDIA cuOpt. Read first when helping users with cuOpt (routing, LP/MILP, QP, installation, server).

plugins.name: cuopt-developer
plugins.description: Contribute to NVIDIA cuOpt codebase including C++/CUDA, Python, server, docs, and CI. Use when the user wants to modify solver internals, add features, submit PRs, or understand the codebase architecture.

plugins.name: cuopt-installation-common
plugins.description: Install cuOpt — system and environment requirements only. Domain concepts; no install commands or interface guidance.

plugins.name: cuopt-installation-api-python
plugins.description: Install cuOpt for Python — pip, conda, Docker, verification. Use when the user is installing or verifying the Python API.

plugins.name: cuopt-installation-api-c
plugins.description: Install cuOpt for C — conda, locate lib/headers, verification. Use when the user is installing or verifying the C API.

plugins.name: cuopt-installation-developer
plugins.description: Developer installation — build cuOpt from source, run tests. Use when the user wants to set up a dev environment to contribute or modify cuOpt.

plugins.name: lp-milp-formulation
plugins.description: LP/MILP concepts and going from problem text to formulation. What LP/MILP are, required formulation questions, typical modeling elements, and how to parse problem statements.

plugins.name: cuopt-lp-milp-api-python
plugins.description: Solve LP and MILP with the Python API. Use when the user asks about optimization with linear constraints, integer variables, scheduling, resource allocation, facility location, or production planning.

plugins.name: cuopt-lp-milp-api-c
plugins.description: LP and MILP with cuOpt — C API only. Use when the user is embedding LP/MILP in C/C++.

plugins.name: cuopt-lp-milp-api-cli
plugins.description: LP and MILP with cuOpt — CLI only (MPS files, cuopt_cli). Use when the user is solving from MPS via command line.

plugins.name: routing-formulation
plugins.description: Vehicle routing (VRP, TSP, PDP) — problem types and data requirements. Domain concepts; no API or interface.

plugins.name: cuopt-routing-api-python
plugins.description: Vehicle routing (VRP, TSP, PDP) with cuOpt — Python API only. Use when the user is building or solving routing in Python.

plugins.name: qp-formulation
plugins.description: Quadratic Programming (QP) — problem form and constraints. Domain concepts; no API or interface. QP is beta.

plugins.name: cuopt-qp-api-python
plugins.description: Quadratic Programming (QP) with cuOpt — Python API only (beta). Use when the user is building or solving QP in Python.

plugins.name: cuopt-qp-api-c
plugins.description: Quadratic Programming (QP) with cuOpt — C API. Use when the user is embedding QP in C/C++.

plugins.name: cuopt-qp-api-cli
plugins.description: QP with cuOpt — CLI (e.g. cuopt_cli with QP-capable input). Use when the user is solving QP from the command line.

plugins.name: cuopt-server-common
plugins.description: cuOpt REST server — what it does and how requests flow. Domain concepts; no deploy or client code.

plugins.name: cuopt-server-api-python
plugins.description: cuOpt REST server — start server, endpoints, Python/curl client examples. Use when the user is deploying or calling the REST API.

plugins.name: skill-evolution
plugins.description: After solving a non-trivial problem, detect generalizable learnings and propose skill updates. Always active.
